How it works

Three steps and your family never gives a wrong gift again.

1

Create a list

Add your child's profile: sizes, interests, birthday. Paste links from any store. Amazon, Target, Nike, Etsy, and anywhere else.

2

Share the link

Send one link to grandparents, aunts, uncles, anyone. No app required for them. The list opens beautifully in any browser.

3

They claim, you relax

Family members claim gifts so no one doubles up. They get the mailing address. Everyone gives with confidence.

Every Celebration

Everything gift givers need

Birthdays, graduations, baby showers. Why, Thank You! works for every gifting moment.

Recipient profiles with sizes

Clothing size, shoe size, age, interests. Everything a gift giver needs to shop confidently.

No duplicate gifts, ever

When someone claims a gift, it's marked taken. No more three people buying the same LEGO set.

Mailing address, safely shared

Family members can only see the mailing address after claiming a gift, encrypted and protected.

Add from any store

Paste any product URL and Why, Thank You! pulls the name, photo, and price automatically.

Built for Families

Private by design

Gift giving should feel warm, not exposed. Every feature is built with privacy in mind.

Encrypted addresses

Mailing addresses are encrypted and only revealed to verified gift claimers, never exposed publicly.

Verified claimers only

Anyone who wants to claim a gift must create an account first. No anonymous claiming.

You control sharing

Share links only go to people you send them to. Lists aren't publicly searchable.

Secure by Supabase

Powered by enterprise-grade database security with row-level security policies protecting every list.

Families Love It

Frequently asked

No app needed! Gift givers just open the shared link in any browser. They can view the wishlist and claim gifts without downloading anything.
Completely. Addresses are encrypted and only revealed after someone claims a gift and creates an account. They're never visible on the public wishlist.
Yes, paste any product URL from Amazon, Target, Walmart, LEGO, Nike, Etsy, and thousands more. Why, Thank You! imports the name, photo, and price automatically.
Yes! The core app is free for families. We offer optional upgrades for power users, but everything you need to share wishlists and claim gifts is free forever.
Any gifting occasion: birthdays, Christmas, Hanukkah, graduations, baby showers, weddings, and more. You can label each list with the occasion type.
